---
title: 'Topic: what makes Ash leave OR, how does he meet E...'
date: '2015-01-22T18:16:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '8887411901545961986'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

Topic: what makes Ash leave OR, how does he meet Eta?
